title: Lossless Study Room
public_claim: Lossless Study Room is a MuranoOS handoff for Applied Intelligence Mission Control.
distinctive_mechanism: It combines distraction capture, per-course and cross-course Obsidian-style Zettelkasten structure, flashcard generation, source capture, coursework state, and review surfaces so graduate study becomes a governed knowledge-production room instead of scattered notes.
use_value: It matters because the same machinery that preserves coursework can later preserve research decisions, sources, and project continuity.
